summary: This is an extremely brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky introduces a redesign of his 'Joel on Software' blog. The entire post consists of a single sentence linking to a separate, more detailed explanation of the redesign rationale. There is no substantive argument or analysis contained in the post itself, which totals only 7 words of actual content beyond the metadata.
key_points: Joel redesigned the Joel on Software blog in December 2008
The rationale for the redesign was published in a separate linked post
The post itself is essentially a redirect notice with no standalone content
key_insight: This is a minimal announcement post serving only as a pointer to a fuller explanation of the blog's redesign, containing no substantive analysis on its own.
